use_cases: File and folder navigation in project explorers or file managers
Displaying organizational structures or team hierarchies
Nested category or tag browsing interfaces
Settings or configuration panels with collapsible sections
ai_summary: A hierarchical tree-view component for displaying nested data structures with expandable and collapsible nodes. Supports single and multi-select functionality, custom icons for files and folders, and smooth expand/collapse animations via Framer Motion. Features both controlled and uncontrolled modes for selection state management.
